title: Now accepting custom summer orders
body: We are ready to accept orders for custom graduation buttons and custom napkins for summer 2026 weddings. Visit our custom products page to get started.

title: Welcome to our new website
body: We'll post announcements and upcoming events here. Check back for updates!

title: Weather policy reminder
body: If Wadena County issues road closures or severe weather advisories, programming may be adjusted. Please watch for updates.

title: We Are Hiring!
body: Wadena County DAC is currently hiring. Starting pay is $15.00 per hour. Benefits include paid sick leave, vacation, and PTO. Call 218-837-5182 or email roseb@wcdac.com for more information.
